title: Sequences and Best trees for the construction of a Solanaceae phylogenetic tree
author: Sierra Reyes, Gina Paola
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: To acknowledge the phylogenetic position of a new genus of Solanaceae, a phylogenetic tree based on rna-seq sequences was built. Here, we uploaded the sequences that were used for it specifying name sequence, orthogroup name (HOG_ID), species and samples name, and type of information (DNA or RNA). In addition, we upload the best trees obtained.
steps_raw: To acknowledge the phylogenetic position of a new genus of Solanaceae, a phylogenetic tree based on rna-seq sequences was built. Here, we uploaded the sequences that were used for it specifying name sequence, orthogroup name (HOG_ID), species and samples name, and type of information (DNA or RNA). In addition, we upload the best trees obtained.
